questions.q: According to a 2026 Canadian Security Intelligence Service (CSIS) report, nearly one in ten counter-terrorism investigations now involves whom?
Reported heavily on May 3, 2026, President Trump stated he would reduce US troop levels 'a lot further' than an initial 5,000 withdrawal in which European country?
According to research highlighted on May 3, 2026, astronomers at the University of Warwick confirmed over 100 hidden exoplanets in NASA's TESS data using a new AI tool named what?
In May 2026, California announced it will begin allowing police to issue traffic tickets directly to the manufacturers of which type of vehicles?
In early May 2026, police found evidence of an explosive device after a vehicle crashed into a health club in which U.S. state, leaving one dead?
In May 2026, the U.S. warned shipping firms they could face sanctions if they pay tolls to which country for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz?
On May 3, 2026, which country's Prime Minister, Donald Tusk, condemned the 'disintegration' of NATO following US announcements of further European troop reductions?
As of early May 2026, the US bypassed congressional review to approve $8.6 billion in military sales to Middle East allies, including Israel, Qatar, the UAE, and which other nation?
On May 3, 2026, President Trump announced he was reviewing a 14-point proposal to end the war and lift blockades involving which Middle Eastern country?
Reported over the weekend of May 3, 2026, the oil tanker M/T Eureka was hijacked off the coast of Yemen and steered toward the waters of which country?
